label: true-dup
a: All service logs must be structured JSON with these required fields: timestamp (ISO 8601), level (DEBUG/INFO/WARN/ERROR), service (from SERVICE_NAME env var), trace_id (propagated from request headers), user_id (when authenticated, omitted otherwise), message.
b: Standardized log format: every log entry is a JSON object. Mandatory fields are timestamp, level, service, trace_id, user_id (optional), and message. Free-form text logs are rejected by the log aggregator pipeline. This format enables structured queries across all services in Loki.
reviewer_notes: Both describe the same JSON log schema with the same mandatory field set.
